sentences.arabic: يَقْضِي بَعْضُ النَّاسِ سَاعَاتٍ طَوِيلَةً أَمَامَ شَاشَةِ الْهَاتِفِ.
sentences.translation: Neki ljudi provode duge sate ispred ekrana telefona.
sentences.translationEn: Some people spend long hours in front of the phone screen.

sentences.arabic: يَنْصَحُ الْأَطِبَّاءُ بِتَقْلِيلِ وَقْتِ الشَّاشَةِ لِلْحِفَاظِ عَلَى صِحَّةِ الْعَيْنِ.
sentences.translation: Ljekari savjetuju smanjenje vremena ispred ekrana radi očuvanja zdravlja očiju.
sentences.translationEn: Doctors advise reducing screen time to maintain eye health.

sentences.arabic: مِنَ الْمُفِيدِ مُمَارَسَةُ الرِّيَاضَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الْجُلُوسِ الطَّوِيلِ.
sentences.translation: Korisno je baviti se sportom umjesto dugog sjedenja.
sentences.translationEn: It is useful to practice sports instead of long sitting.
